collection_method.description: Reviews were collected using the newest-first sorting method to prioritize the most recent user feedback.

cleaning_decisions.deduplication: Removed duplicate reviews based on reviewId.
cleaning_decisions.empty_entries: Removed reviews with empty or null content.
cleaning_decisions.short_reviews: Removed reviews with fewer than 15 characters after cleaning.

field_selection.removed_fields: All other fields (such as, userImage and additional metadata) were removed.

cleaning_decisions.review_id_transformation: Replaced original non-numeric review IDs with sequential human-readable IDs in the format rev_0001, rev_0002, etc.
